news.t: MBS ETFs: Rally Rolls on After Record-Setting Year
Navigate Fixed Income with PIMCO's Active ETF Trio
Angel Oak Capital Advisors Completes Conversion of Two Mutual Funds to ETFs

overview.description: The Angel Oak Mortgage-Backed Securities ETF (MBS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seekingtotal returns through investments in various US mortgage-backed securities (MBS) of any credit quality and maturity. MBS was launched on Feb 20, 2024 and is issued by Angel Oak.

data.title: MBS ETFs: Rally Rolls on After Record-Setting Year
data.text: Agency mortgage-backed securities (MBS) are quietly coming off their best year since 2002 — climbing over 8.5%. So far, the macroeconomic backdrop of 2026 suggests last year's rally was far from a flu...

data.title: Navigate Fixed Income with PIMCO's Active ETF Trio
data.text: Higher-for-longer interest rates and a new Federal Reserve chair confirmation are only adding to the market uncertainty in fixed income. With that, active management has almost become a necessity when...

data.title: Angel Oak Capital Advisors Completes Conversion of Two Mutual Funds to ETFs
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $AOHY #ETF--Angel Oak Capital Advisors completes conversion of two mutual funds to ETFs bringing new actively-managed structured credit funds to investors.
